checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 107 records an evidence-only closure for the issue 097 docs, tests, and status live slice chain after issues 101, 103, and 105 completed.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The closure records all three slices, merged PRs 102/104/106, completed issues 101/103/105, 3 ready summaries, 0 blocked summaries, 3 executors, 9/9 validation checks passed, and policy gate ready rate 1.

checked_dimensions.name: runtime_boundary
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 107 did not launch Claude Code, Antigravity, or any runtime launch plan. It only reads existing evidence and writes closure artifacts.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No secrets, production, billing, auth or authorization security, database, dependency installation, CI/CD security, deployment automation, or production deployment paths were touched.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are limited to allowed evidence, documentation, report, audit, closure, metrics, scope, contract, and memory paths. No protected files, CI/CD security controls, dependency manifests, deployment automation, production configuration, secrets, keys, auth security, authorization security, billing, or database paths were changed.

checked_dimensions.name: metric_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: `.specbridge/metrics/issue-107-post-preflight-live-pilot-closure.autonomy-metrics.json` validates and records summary_count=3, ready_count=3, blocked_count=0, executor_count=3, validation_totals.passed=9, and policy_gate_ready_rate=1.

checked_dimensions.name: github_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub evidence was checked for issues 101, 103, and 105 and PRs 102, 104, and 106. The prior slice PRs are merged and their issues are closed completed.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local validations passed for standard profile, smoke, CLI tests, autonomy metrics, contracts, scopes, final reports, audit packets, ChatGPT audits, security gate, review gate, and git diff whitespace. GitHub CI remains an external merge gate and is recorded as pending where not yet collected.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI for issue 107 is not collected yet and remains an external merge gate. The final report marks CI as not_collected rather than passed.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local completion pending PR CI, no deployment, and the one-command issue-to-merge operator as future work.

findings.evidence: Issue 107 local closure evidence is prepared, but GitHub CI cannot be recorded as passed until the branch is pushed and checks run.
findings.recommendation: Push the branch, open a pull request, wait for GitHub checks, and merge only if required gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending.
The next one-command issue-to-merge operator remains a future dedicated contract.
